title: Local file context integration
description: File picker via Tauri dialog plugin. Read file contents. Context card rendering with filename, first few lines preview, relative size bar. Card expand/reorder/remove. Optional watch mode via notify crate. Split from mood-editor-ona.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: File card component renders filename, preview, size bar correctly. Card reorder updates sort_order.
- Integration: Pick file via dialog mock → verify content read and cached. Watch file → modify → verify cache update event fires.
- Manual: File picker opens native dialog. Card preview shows useful first lines. Size bar proportions make sense. Expand/collapse is smooth.

title: Conversation forking
description: Cmd+B conversation forking via pi fork(). Branch comparison.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Fork point detection from selected message. Pi session.fork() creates correct JSONL branch.
- Integration: Fork at message 3 of 5 → verify new session shares first 3 messages. Both branches independently continuable. Fork appears as linked note in library.
- Manual: Cmd+B on a message feels intuitive. Fork comparison side-by-side is readable. Navigating between forks is smooth.

title: Notion context integration
description: Notion OAuth, page browser, blocks-to-Markdown conversion.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Notion block-to-markdown converter handles text, headings, lists, code, callouts, toggles. OAuth token refresh logic.
- Integration: Fetch real Notion page → verify markdown output matches expected structure. Page with nested blocks → verify depth handled.
- Manual: OAuth flow completes without confusion. Page browser shows workspace hierarchy. Converted content is accurate.

title: Basic CodeMirror 6 setup with markdown mode
description: Set up CodeMirror 6 in React. Markdown language mode, editor state management, basic warm dark theme styling, placeholder text. Standard markdown highlighting only — no hybrid rendering yet. Split from mood-editor-2y0.
close_reason: CM6 editor with markdown mode, warm dark theme, word count

comments.author: Raag
comments.text: Tests needed retroactively: Vitest unit tests for Editor component mount/unmount, extension loading, onChange callback. Will add when Vitest is set up (part of first E2E test infra task).

comments.author: Raag
comments.text: Test debt resolved: 13 Vitest tests added covering Editor component (7), extensions module (6). Run via pnpm test.

title: SQLite note store with FTS
description: SQLite schema for notes/tags/context_sets/note_links/FTS. CRUD, status filtering, search.
close_reason: SQLite store with full schema, CRUD, FTS, tags, links. 7 tests passing.

comments.author: Raag
comments.text: Tests delivered: 7 Rust unit tests covering create/get/update/delete notes, FTS search, tag filtering, note links. All use in-memory SQLite. Run via cargo test.

title: Tauri + React scaffold with warm dark theme
description: Initialize Tauri v2 + React 19 + Tailwind CSS v4 + IPC bridge + warm dark theme. See docs/plan.md.
close_reason: Scaffold complete: Tauri v2 + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + IPC bridge + warm dark theme

title: Inline AI document generation
description: Connect Tab-to-invoke UX to pi agent. Stream AI-generated text in-place at insertion point. Generated text appears slightly lighter. Press Enter to accept (text normalizes). Press Esc to dismiss generated text. Split from mood-editor-smr.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Generation state machine (idle → generating → preview → accepted/dismissed). Content insertion at correct cursor position.
- Integration: Submit instruction → mock pi response → verify text streams into document at insertion point. Accept normalizes text style. Dismiss removes generated text.
- Manual: Generated text appears slightly lighter (distinguishable). Streaming in-place feels natural. Accept/dismiss is instant.

title: Pi crate integration in Tauri backend
description: Link pi_agent_rust crate in Tauri backend. create_agent_session() + event stream via Tauri IPC.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Session create/teardown, event parsing, error handling (invalid key, network failure), model registry queries
- Integration: IPC round-trip — invoke create_session from frontend mock, verify event stream delivers to JS
- Manual: Send a real message with valid API key, verify streaming response renders token-by-token without jank

title: Library search and filtering
description: Full-text search across titles, content, tags via SQLite FTS. Search qualifiers: tag:plan, status:active. Tag tap filters list instantly. Status filtering (hide completed/dropped by default). Split from mood-editor-3ts.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit (Vitest): Search input debounces correctly. Tag qualifier parsing (tag:plan, status:active) extracts correct filter params.
- Integration: Create tagged notes, search by FTS term, verify results. Filter by tag, verify only matching notes show. Status filter hides completed by default.
- Manual: Search feels instant (<100ms perceived). Tag click filters immediately. Clearing search restores full list without flicker.

title: Distill flow (conversation to document)
description: Cmd+D distill conversation to document. AI synthesis. Linked pairs via note_links.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Distill prompt builder constructs correct system prompt from conversation messages. Note link creation with correct type.
- Integration: Conversation with 5 messages → Cmd+D → type 'plan' → verify new document note created with distilled_from link. Verify distilled content is structured per template.
- Manual: Distill prompt appears inline naturally. AI synthesis produces coherent output. Linked pair navigable from library.

title: Note list panel with Cmd+O navigation
description: Library panel that slides in from left on Cmd+O. Note list sorted by last edited. Each note shows: first line as title, one-line excerpt, soft date, status dot (blue/green/grey), tag chips. Conversation/document type icons. Split from mood-editor-3ts.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit (Vitest): NoteList component renders correct number of items. Type icons (conversation/document) match note type. Status dots use correct colors.
- Integration: Create notes via IPC, open library panel, verify list matches DB state. Verify Cmd+O toggles panel.
- Manual: Slide-in animation is 150-200ms, smooth. Note excerpts are readable. Date formatting is human-friendly. Panel doesn't occlude content awkwardly.

title: CodeMirror 6 hybrid Markdown editor
description: CodeMirror 6 with hybrid inline Markdown rendering. Cursor-aware syntax toggle.

title: Context sets (persistent + tag-triggered)
description: Persistent context sets, tag-triggered loading, pi extension injection.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Context set CRUD. Tag-trigger matching logic. Content assembly for pi extension injection.
- Integration: Create context set with trigger tag 'plan' → create note with #plan tag → verify context items auto-loaded in tray. Verify assembled content injected in pi system prompt.
- Manual: Pre-loaded items appear muted with set name whisper. Adding/removing items from set persists across app restart.

title: Conversation-in-document mode
description: Cmd+Return inline Q&A within documents. Collapsible margin annotations.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Cmd+Return creates inline conversation state at cursor position. Esc collapse creates margin annotation data.
- Integration: In document → Cmd+Return → type question → get AI answer → Esc → verify annotation created. Tap annotation → verify conversation expands.
- Manual: Inline Q&A doesn't disrupt document flow. Collapsed annotations are visible but unobtrusive. Expanding/collapsing is smooth.

title: Tab-to-invoke inline AI UX
description: In document mode: Tab at start of line shows thin glowing insertion line. Type instruction in natural language. Press Enter to submit, Esc to dismiss. Instruction disappears on submit. UX shell only — no AI integration yet. Split from mood-editor-smr.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit (Vitest): Tab at line start triggers insertion mode. Instruction input captures text correctly. Enter/Esc state transitions.
- Manual: Glowing insertion line is visible but not distracting. Typing instruction feels natural. Esc dismisses cleanly. Tab elsewhere (mid-line) does nothing unusual.

title: GitHub context integration
description: GitHub PAT auth, repo browser, file/PR/issue fetching as context items.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: PAT validation. Repo tree parsing. Diff format extraction.
- Integration: Fetch real public repo file → verify content matches. Browse repo tree → verify directory listing. Fetch PR diff → verify diff content.
- Manual: Auth flow stores PAT securely. Repo browser is navigable. File/PR/issue content renders as useful context cards.

title: Context tray universal search
description: Universal search field in context tray: type filename -> filesystem search, type note title -> previous notes, paste URL -> fetch content. Results grouped by source with monochrome icons. Search across all connected sources. Split from mood-editor-ona.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Search dispatcher routes queries to correct source (filesystem vs notes vs URL). Result grouping logic groups by source type.
- Integration: Search term that matches both a file and a note → verify both appear in correct groups. Paste URL → verify fetch and card creation.
- Manual: Search across sources feels unified. Results load progressively, not blocking. Source icons are distinguishable.

title: Multi-model support
description: Model picker, mid-conversation switching, response attribution.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Model registry lists available models. Model switch mid-conversation updates session config. Response attribution tags correct model.
- Integration: Start conversation with model A → switch to model B → send message → verify model B used. Verify attribution visible in message metadata.
- Manual: Model picker is accessible but not intrusive. Mid-conversation switch is seamless. Attribution is subtle but findable.

title: Library view (note list + search)
description: Cmd+O library view. Note list with search, tag filter, status dots, unified conversations+documents.

title: Streaming event subscription and input flow
description: Subscribe to pi event stream via Tauri IPC. Live token streaming display. Enter-to-send message composition. Steering support (type while AI streams). Split from mood-editor-kby.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Event subscription hook correctly buffers tokens into message state. Enter-to-send dispatches IPC call.
- Integration: Mock pi event stream, verify tokens appear incrementally in the DOM. Verify steering message interrupts current stream.
- Manual: Send real message, verify token-by-token streaming is smooth (not janky/batched). Type while AI streams to test steering. Check Enter sends, Shift+Enter inserts newline.

title: Ship sheet (export/publish)
description: Cmd+E ship sheet. Save to file, copy, push to GitHub, run with agent.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Markdown-to-plain-text stripper. GitHub push payload construction.
- Integration: Save to file → verify file contents match. Copy as markdown → verify clipboard. Push to GitHub → verify commit created (mock or test repo).
- Manual: Cmd+E feels responsive. Save dialog defaults to sensible path. Copy feedback is clear. GitHub push shows progress/success.

title: Claude conversation import
description: Parse Claude JSON export into pi JSONL sessions + SQLite note records.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: JSON parser handles Claude export format. Message structure preserved (user/assistant alternation). Timestamps mapped correctly. Malformed JSON returns clear error.
- Integration: Import real Claude export file → verify note count matches conversations. Verify each note has pi_session JSONL. Verify #imported/claude tag. Verify FTS indexes imported content.
- Manual: Import completes in reasonable time for 100+ conversations. Imported conversations are browsable and continuable.

title: Tag-based mode switching and templates
description: Tag-based mode switching: #chat/#plan/#blog/#tweet/#scratch. Templates, contextual Enter.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit: Tag parser extracts #chat/#plan/#blog/#tweet from first line. Mode resolver returns correct Enter behavior per tag. Template loader returns correct template per tag.
- Integration: Type #plan as first word in new note → verify template loads and Enter inserts newline. Type #chat → verify Enter sends message.
- Manual: Mode switch feels instant. Template content is useful. No visual jarring on mode transition.

title: Context tray UI shell
description: Slide-up panel from bottom of window (like iOS Control Center). Translucent overlay, writing visible behind. Drag/push down to dismiss. Tiny context count badge in bottom margin. No content integration yet — just the animated panel shell. Split from mood-editor-ona.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit (Vitest): Tray component state transitions (closed/opening/open/closing). Context count badge updates from prop.
- Manual: Drag-up gesture feels like iOS Control Center. Translucent overlay — writing visible behind. Push-down dismisses smoothly. Animation is 150-200ms. No scroll interference with main content.

title: Conversation message rendering and layout
description: Display user and AI messages with distinct styling (weight/opacity). Scroll behavior, conversation structure. No bubbles, no avatars — dialogue flows like prose. Static rendering of message history from pi session. Split from mood-editor-kby.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit (Vitest): Message component renders user vs AI messages with correct styling classes. Empty conversation shows placeholder.
- Integration: Load a pi JSONL session file, verify all messages render in correct order with correct roles.
- Manual: Verify visual weight distinction between user and AI text is readable. Scroll behavior feels natural with long conversations.

title: Conversation rendering and message flow
description: Subscribe to pi events. Render conversation messages on page. Enter-to-send.

title: Hybrid inline Markdown rendering with cursor-aware toggle
description: CodeMirror 6 extension for hybrid inline rendering: headings render as headings, bold as bold, code blocks with syntax highlighting. When cursor enters a Markdown element, raw syntax appears. When cursor leaves, it re-renders. Progressive enhancement on top of basic CM6 setup. Split from mood-editor-2y0.
acceptance_criteria:
## Tests
- Unit (Vitest): CM6 extension produces correct decorations for headings, bold, code blocks. Cursor enter/leave toggles raw syntax.
- Manual: Open editor, type markdown with h1/h2/bold/code/links. Move cursor through each element — verify raw syntax appears at cursor, renders away when cursor leaves. Check no flicker on fast cursor movement.

title: Context tray with local file support
description: Context tray from bottom. Universal search (files, repos, notes, URLs). Cards with preview.

title: Inline document AI generation
description: Tab-to-invoke inline AI in document mode. Inline instruction, generation, accept/dismiss.
